name: LinkedIn Email Trigger → Auto Comment (Webhook Push)

nodes.name: Webhook: Gmail Push (Pub/Sub)
nodes.notes: Google Cloud Pub/Sub posts here when Gmail receives a new email. Set this webhook URL as your Pub/Sub push endpoint. URL is: https://n8n.srv863249.hstgr.cloud/webhook/linkedin-gmail-push

nodes.name: Gmail: List New Messages (History)
nodes.notes: Calls Gmail history API to get new messages since the historyId. Uses same Gmail OAuth2 credential.

nodes.name: Gmail: Get Full Message
nodes.notes: Fetches the full email content including headers and body.

nodes.name: Filter: Is Post Notification?
nodes.notes: Edit PEOPLE_TO_MONITOR to control whose posts trigger the workflow.

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.text:
=You are an Expert LinkedIn Networker and Thought Leader.
Your task is to write a short, engaging comment on a LinkedIn post.

Guidelines:
- Use simple words.
- Use a "Chris Do style from The Futur" — direct, insightful, grounded.
- **Be Concise:** Keep it under 50 words. Short and punchy.
- Do not be overly excited. No exclamation overload.
- **Add Value:** Never say "Great post" or "Thanks for sharing". Offer a specific insight or a polite counter-point.
- **Engage:** End with one short open-ended question to invite a reply.
- **Tone:** Professional but conversational. No hashtags. No emojis.
- **No Names:** NEVER use the author's name (e.g. "Yann", "Sarah") in the comment text. Jump straight into the insight.
- **Language Matching:** MUST ALWAYS write the comment in the exact same language as the the Post Content.

Context:
- Author: {{ $json.author }}
- Post URL: {{ $json.post_url }}
- Post Content: {{ $json.post_text }}

Write ONLY the comment text — no labels, no preamble.

parameters.subject: 🚨 LinkedIn Auto-Comment: Review & Publish
parameters.message:
=

New LinkedIn Comment Ready for Review:


  • Author: {{ $('Extract URN + Post Text').item.json.author }}
  • Post URL: {{ $('Extract URN + Post Text').item.json.post_url }}

Generated Comment:

{{ $('Merge Comment + URN').item.json.comment }}




✅ Approve & Publish Now✏️ Edit in n8n

If you click Edit, simply open the Wait node in n8n, change the comment text, and click Resume.
